name: options-dashboard
next_steps: 1. SSH into instance: ssh -i options_dashboard.pem ubuntu@98.94.234.0
2. Clone your repository: git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/fin.git
3. Run setup script: cd fin && bash ec2_setup.sh
5. Install SSL: sudo apt install certbot python3-certbot-nginx -y && sudo certbot --nginx -d yourdomain.duckdns.org
